title: micranthemum rotundatum
intro: Micranthemum rotundatum, also known as round-leaved micranthemum, is a type of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Micranthemum rotundatum include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
